description: Very large document in a distinctive script, with a very long list of prices and commodities, which continues over on to verso. Currencies are dinar and rubāʿiyya. On verso, inverted in relation to the main text, there is what appears to be a receipt, mentioning ‘Yaʿaqov … who is with his nephew’, Yiṣḥaq b. Taḥanun for 15 and a half dinars, and ‘3 rubāʿiyya received for the tax collector (ṣāhib al-kharāj)’. (Information from CUDL.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
